title: Demo: Acme Order Entry (GUI wizard, Windows)
summary: Windows counterpart of demo/hello — identical task and data, only OS conventions differ (E:\agenthle paths, .cmd launcher). The agent drives a multi-step web form (input\app.html) in Chrome via screenshots/clicks/typing, entering data from input\order.json, to obtain an in-browser confirmation code, then writes it to output\result.txt.
